---
# TITLE-MARKER
title: "2025 Releases"
date: last-modified
categories: ["releases by year"]
listing:
# LISTING-MARKER
  - id: 2025-releases
    type: grid
    max-description-length: 250
    sort: "date desc"
    fields: [title, subtitle, description]
    contents:
        - ./**/**.qmd
---

::: {.callout}
Releases after April 2025 are available on the [all releases](/releases/all-releases.qmd) page.
:::

<!-- EMBED-MARKER -->
:::{#2025-releases}
:::
